task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Support Triage (AI-assisted)** (Level 9)

Build a support ticket triage system. Tickets have subject, body, from_email, category, priority, status. Use a Claude agent named 'Triage' that receives a ticket and returns a JSON object with {category, priority}. When a new ticket is POSTed, call the Triage agent to classify it before saving. Need: POST /api/tickets (auto-classifies), GET /api/tickets (list), GET /api/tickets/open.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  body
  from_email
  category, default 'General'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  status, default 'open'

allow signup and login
owner is 'support@example.com'

agent 'Triage' receives ticket:
  response = ask claude 'You are a support ticket triage system. Analyze the ticket and assign a category (Bug, Feature Request, Documentation, Billing, General) and priority (Critical, High, Normal, Low). Return ONLY valid JSON.' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
  send back response

when user calls POST /api/tickets sending data:
  validate data:
    subject is text, required
    body is text
    from_email is text, required, matches email
  classified = call 'Triage' with data
  set data's category to classified's category
  set data's priority to classified's priority
  saved = save data to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  tickets = get all Tickets
  send back tickets

when user calls GET /api/tickets/open:
  open_tickets = get all Tickets where status is 'open'
  send back open_tickets

page 'Inbox' at '/':
  heading 'Support Triage'
  section 'New Ticket':
    'Subject' as text input saved as subject
    'From Email' as text input saved as from_email
    'Body' as text area saved as body
    button 'Submit Ticket':
      send { subject, from_email, body } as a new record to '/api/tickets'
      set subject to ''
      set from_email to ''
      set body to ''
      show alert 'Ticket submitted and auto-classified!'
  section 'Open Tickets':
    on page load get open_tickets from '/api/tickets/open'
    display open_tickets as table
